_publications._publicationTitle: The development of the PlexiQoL: A patient-reported outcome measure for adults with neurofibromatosis type 1-associated plexiform neurofibromas.
_publications._context: The PlexiQoL is the first disease-specific PRO assessing the ability of adults with NF-1 associated pNFs to meet their basic human needs.

basicInfo.psychometricProperties: excellent internal consistency, reproducibility, and sensitivity to differences in patient-perceived pNF severity
